chain.thought: The Democratic candidate (Chris Murphy) received 54.8% of the vote, while the Republican candidate (Linda McMahon) received 43.1%. The percentage difference between the two candidates can be calculated by subtracting the Republican candidate's percentage from the Democratic candidate's percentage (54.8 - 43.1). Therefore, the percentage difference is 11.7%.
